description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 6/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Ensure errors include enough context for debugging without leaking prompts,
  raw provider responses, or secrets.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Tightened display-safe error context by routing public error formatting through the sanitizer, adding string/tuple/struct sanitization, and covering raw prompt/raw response/secret redaction while preserving request and agent debugging identifiers. Verified with focused error tests plus full format, compile, test, docs, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E7: Ensure errors include enough context for debugging without leaking prompts, raw...
